title: Advanced TFC Tech Unofficial
description: Port of Advanced TFC Tech by PyralIron for TerraFirmaCraft 1.18+.
body:
This mod introduces new multiblock machines for TerraFirmaCraft using Immersive Engineering's API.

Check Engineer's Manual for multiblock structures and other details.

---
### Machines
- **Power Loom** weaves fibers into cloths.

- **Thresher** splits inedible husk from the raw crop, leaving unrefined grain.

- **Grist Mill** grinds grain into flour.

- **Beamhouse** handles liming, washing and tanning of hides.

- **Fleshing Machine** scrapes hides.
---
### Dependencies
- [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft)

- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
---
### Credits

- PyralIron for creating the original mod

- tao6626 for recreating multiblock models
